title: dns-sync Config File
description: Configuration file for dns-sync. Defines providers and zone sync mappings.

providers.description: Named provider instances. Each key is a provider name referenced by zones.

zones.description: Zone sync mappings. Each key is a fully-qualified zone name ending with a dot (e.g. example.com.).

readonly.description: Mark this provider as read-only. It can be used as a zone source but not as a sync target.

directory.description: (yaml) Path to the directory containing zone YAML files.

api_token.description: (cloudflare) Scoped API token with Zone:DNS:Edit permission. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.

account_id.description: (cloudflare) Account ID to narrow zone lookup. Optional but recommended when managing zones across multiple accounts.

access_key_id.description: (route53) AWS access key ID. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.

secret_access_key.description: (route53) AWS secret access key. Supports ${ENV_VAR} interpolation.

hosted_zone_id.description: (route53) Hosted zone ID. If provided, skips zone lookup by name. Accepts Z1234567890ABC or /hostedzone/Z1234567890ABC.

project.description: (gcp_cloud_dns) GCP project ID. Inferred from credentials or GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT env var if omitted.

credentials_file.description: (gcp_cloud_dns) Path to a service account JSON key file. Falls back to GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS, Application Default Credentials, or the metadata server.

private.description: (gcp_cloud_dns) Filter zones by visibility. true = private zones only, false = public zones only, null (default) = no filter.

zoneConfig.description: Sync mapping for a single DNS zone.

source.description: Provider name to read the desired DNS state from. Must be defined in providers.

targets.description: One or more provider names to sync DNS state to. Must be defined in providers and not readonly.
